SEARCH
Package xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems

Class CombatTimer

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems.CombatTimer
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class CombatTimer extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
a system that keeps track of if a player is in combat. functions as a timer of 30 seconds and is reset until the end of combat.
